---
title: "About Me"
image: images/me.JPG
about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 15em
  #image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/osuemer
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/omer-sumer/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sumeromer
    - text: Scholar
      icon: google
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=h5sbUygAAAAJ&hl=en
bibliography: references.bib
---


As a researcher in computer vision and machine learning, I focus on a variety of methods and applications in affective computing, digital healthcare, and biomedical computer vision.

I enjoy sharing my enthusiasm for machine learning and data science. Here, I'm about to begin documenting my zettelkasten notes from what I read, the activities that I participated in, and small-scale data science and machine learning projects. I also write for various sources on how artificial intelligence and the digital humanities interact (you can find the English translation of monthly articles that I wrote for [Manifold](https://www.manifold.press/indeks/omer-sumer)).


My interests aside from work include digital and analog photography, mountains, the arts, and culture. Usually, over the weekends, you can find me experimenting with film development processes at home, visiting an exhibition in the area, or on a hiking tour crossing borders in the Alps.


**Email:** suemer.oemer@gmail.com


#### Education

{{< fa graduation-cap >}}  **University of Tübingen**, Germany  
PhD in Computer Science. *August 2017 - March 2021*  
[Multimodal Visual Sensing: Automated Estimation of Engagement](https://publikationen.uni-tuebingen.de/xmlui/handle/10900/113627)

{{< fa graduation-cap >}}  **Istanbul Technical University**, Istanbul, Turkey  
M.Sc. in Electronics Engineering. *July 2012 - September 2014*  

{{< fa graduation-cap >}}  **Naval Academy**, Istanbul, Turkey  
B.Sc. in Electronics Engineering.  *July 2006 - August 2010*  


<p align="center">
  <img width=600px src="images/Oemer_Suemer_maybe_magazine.jpg" />
</p>
